primary.name: Mizuno Pro M13
primary.lie_angle: 0.5 degree more upright than Mizuno standard
primary.modifications: Factory tip weight removed, tape weight added at center-back CG
primary.result: Swing weights normalized to ~D2 across 5-9 irons; leftward ball flight reduced
primary.next_action: Flatten lie angle at least 0.5 degree to return to factory standard

secondary.name: Miura KM-700
secondary.issue: Head weights running 1.7-4.5g lighter than published Miura specs (outside ±0.5g tolerance)
